---
title: "Marin Girard"
---

::: {.hero-intro}
I study how classical objectivity and spacetime emerge from quantum information.
:::

I am a PhD student in physics at Virginia Tech working on quantum foundations and quantum error correction.

This site collects my research directions, publications, and CV.

::: {.trust-links}
[Google Scholar](#) · [ORCID](#) · [Email](mailto:youremail@vt.edu)
:::
